user.title: Carris Metropolitana — Municipalities
user.description: Select the municipalities in the Lisbon Metropolitan Area you want to monitor.

lines.title: Carris Metropolitana — Lines
lines.description: Select the bus lines you want to track.

stops.title: Carris Metropolitana — Stops
stops.description: Select the stops to monitor for upcoming arrivals (optional).

error.no_municipalities_selected: Please select at least one municipality.
error.no_lines_found: No lines found for the selected municipalities.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found for the selected municipalities.
error.timeout: The connection to the Carris Metropolitana API timed out. Please try again later.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for more information.

init.description: Change the monitored lines and stops.
